name: Gold and Beyond
description_short: Gold and Beyond is a credit repair provider based in Las Vegas, Nevada. Rated 4.8/5 with 1,408 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Gold and Beyond is a credit repair provider serving clients in Las Vegas, Nevada. With 1,408 Google reviews and a 4.8/5.0 rating, Gold and Beyond has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a pawn shop, diamond dealer, discount store, Gold and Beyond provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Las Vegas, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Gold and Beyond operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Las Vegas, Nevada area who are considering Gold and Beyond should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

diagnosis: A highly-rated credit repair provider in Las Vegas, Nevada with strong customer satisfaction. Best suited for consumers who prefer working with an established, well-reviewed local provider.
